title: D&D Zombie Dragon Adventure (2026)
description: A Dungeons and Dragons flavoured roguelike in Fortnite Creative.
bullets: Led collaboration between design and engineering teams.
Designed a multiphase boss encounter and custom enemies.
Designed and implemented core gameplay, progression systems, reward systems, and metagame loops.
Designed and implemented room encounters and events.
Devised balance formulas that used hit-to-kill as the lynchpin of encounters and game progression.
Built and implemented 50+ rooms and polished wayfinding flows to support gameplay, tone, and pacing.
Diagnosed retention and satisfaction gaps through live analytics.
challengeParagraphs: Creating a legible and navigable interconnected map while avoiding softlocks.
Devising the correct lynch-pin value to balance challenge, economy, and progression.
Translating load-bearing IP elements into UEFN and keep them recognizable.

title: Null Core (unreleased)
description: A rogue-like bullet-hell tank adventure. Clear dungeons solo or co-op as you follow a group of rebel tanks fighting against an evil empire.
bullets: Designed core game loops and player progression.
Designed player 'boons' and upgrades.
Designed and implemented enemy encounters and level layouts.
challengeParagraphs: Creating 'boons' and upgrades that can synergize across different playstyles.

title: Courtyard King: The Walking Dead Universe (2025)
roles: Project Lead, Systems Designer & Level Designer
description: An adaptation of The Walking Dead IP into a 3-way king of the hill-style game with roguelite elements in Fortnite Creative.
bullets: Led the project from concept to live-service launch, coordinating cross-discipline collaboration.
Designed and implemented core gameplay, progression, reward, and enemy systems.
Designed player ranking system.
Built and implemented level layouts and wayfinding flows to support gameplay, tone, and pacing.
Diagnosed retention and satisfaction gaps through live analytics.
challengeParagraphs: Designing a dynamic enemy system that maintained challenge for 1 or 12 players in different game areas.
Making the interconnected level readable and navigable for all teams as capture points changed location.
Performance drops kept us from addressing key balance issues early.

sessions.detail: Day 1 retention improvement through data-driven live updates

title: Boss Lab Project (2024)
description: A boss-rush roguelike where creating more powerful boss-encounters defined character progression.
bullets: Designed modular skill and ability systems for both player and boss characters.
Designed and implemented skill tree system and UI using UMG and BPs.
Designed and implemented player's range abilities using BPs.
Conducted playtesting and player surveying to refine controls and balance.
challengeParagraphs: Exploring a counterintuitive approach to player agency: advancing was about creating your own challenges, not empowerment.
Designing modular character skills and abilities for enemies that could synergize dynamically.

title: Species (2024)
description: Species is a 2-4 player card game where each takes the role of ecosystem stewards and work towards keeping their chosen ecosystem in balance as new species arrive. The objective is to foster a diverse ecosystem while managing effects triggered by species.
bullets: Designed card mechanics and card layouts for an educational, environment-themed game.
Conducted research on edutainment games and Canadian invasive species.
Organized and facilitated playtest sessions, gathering data on mechanics' clarity, scientific content, layout, and user experience.
challengeParagraphs: Balancing accessibility, gameplay, and scientific accuracy to ensure the game was engaging and informative without overloading players with facts.
Making a game that could be a teaching tool but was not itself teaching the content. I wanted to foster a context where players could learn.

title: Unpublished PvPvE Project (2024)
description: A PvPvE multiplayer horror-themed game that aimed to adapt and mix core elements from the game Evolve with some battle royale elements from Fortnite in a 1v4 match.
bullets: Led the project's ideation and prototype phases, coordinating cross-discipline collaboration.
Designed core gameplay, progression systems, reward system, and metagame loops.
Built and implemented core level layout.
challengeParagraphs: Designing and balancing asymmetric teams, with different incentives and progressions.

title: Forgotten Runiverse (2023)
description: A fantasy pixel art MMORPG with TBA combat system where players play as wizards that can craft their own spells and items.
bullets: Defined combat and item formulas.
Designed character abilities and items.
Designed combat encounters and rewards.
Developed combat system simulations to inform balancing decisions.
Coordinated with other systems designers to balance player-led economy.
challengeParagraphs: Balancing stats, items, and combat that were intricately tied to a player-led creations and economy.
Creating engaging asymmetry in item combinations and stat bases to encourage player builds.

title: Racoon Princess (2023)
description: A fantasy pixel art adventure proof of concept where you take the role of the Racoon Princess, lost heir to a kingdom she can decide to retake or not.
bullets: Designed game world, story, and characters.
Integrated Yarn Spinner to develop game's branching narrative.
challengeParagraphs: Managing and implementing a branching narrative system.
